news.title: İngiltere Başbakanı Keir Starmer istifa etti
news.summary: İngiltere'de Başbakan ve iktidardaki İşçi Partisi'nin lideri Keir Starmer görevinden istifa etti. Starmer yeni bir lider seçilene dek görevini sürdürecek. Başbakanlık için en favori isim olarak görülen Andy Burnham adaylığını açıkladı.

news.title: Akbelen protestoları: Esra Işık'ın duruşması 6 Temmuz'a ertelendi

news.title: Ukrayna donanması, Türk sahipli yük gemisinin Rus İHA'sıyla vurulduğunu duyurdu

news.title: First round of US-Iran talks ends with encouraging progress, mediators say
news.summary: The US-Iran talks began on Sunday in Switzerland, after last week's agreement, which includes a commitment to reach a final deal within 60 days.

news.title: Trump-backed political outsider wins Colombia election, initial count shows
news.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella appears to have narrowly defeated his rival Iván Cepeda, who says the preliminary count is "not yet official or binding".

news.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced his resignation on Monday. And, the U.S. and Iran have agreed to a "roadmap" to reach a final deal within 60 days.

news.title: Keir Starmer announces resignation as UK prime minister
news.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said Monday he is stepping down as leader of the governing Labour Party and will leave office within weeks, scarcely two years after being elected in a landslide.

news.title: Despite state bans, abortions have almost doubled. The reason? Pills via telehealth
news.summary: States that have banned abortion are suing to stop mailing of abortion pills over state lines. But the telehealth providers say no matter the outcome, they can adapt, and so will their patients.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
